en: A PSALM OF DAVID.O LORD, who shall sojourn in your tent? Who shall dwell on your holy hill?
zh: 耶和華啊！誰能在你的帳幕裡寄居？ 誰能在你的聖山上居住呢？

en: He who walks blamelessly and does what is right and speaks truth in his heart;
zh: 就是行為完全，作事公義， 心裡說誠實話的人。

en: who does not slander with his tongue and does no evil to his neighbor, nor takes up a reproach against his friend;
zh: 他不以舌頭詆毀人， 不惡待朋友， 也不毀謗他的鄰居。

en: in whose eyes a vile person is despised, but who honors those who fear the LORD; who swears to his own hurt and does not change;
zh: 他眼中藐視卑鄙的人， 卻尊重敬畏耶和華的人。 他起了誓，縱然自己吃虧，也不更改。

en: who does not put out his money at interest and does not take a bribe against the innocent. He who does these things shall never be moved.
zh: 他不拿自己的銀子放債取利， 也不收受賄賂陷害無辜； 行這些事的人，必永不動搖。
